allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('peerDeps:', json.dumps\(d.get\('peerDependencies',{}\), indent=2\)\); print\('jsx runtime:', d.get\('jsxRuntime','not specified'\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('version:', d.get\('version'\)\); print\('peerDeps:', json.dumps\(d.get\('peerDependencies',{}\), indent=2\)\)")
